历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18985, 23303, 21577, 21515, and 23042 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, oscillating within the 21515–23042 range in recent three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 23042, slightly shifting backward by about 1527 compared to 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province Physics Category was 145 in 2021, 174 in 2022, 197 in 2023, 201 in 2024, and 205 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year; however, the 2026 plan sharply drops to 165, a decrease of 40 from 2025, a reduction of about 19.5%, which is a significant contraction, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 74th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 78th in 2021 to 74th in 2026), and its comprehensive strength ranks among the top provincial universities in the central region; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to Nanchang University men's volleyball team winning the championship in the 2025–2026 season of the University Volleyball League, gaining widespread positive exposure; Douyin popularity ranking is 43/106 (relatively hot), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, which has a certain boosting effect on application enthusiasm; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Materials Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline; medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have outstanding strength, with national first-class undergraduate program construction points, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to have high social popularity, and Nanchang University has a layout in these fields; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition, and compared to the 422-point decrease in 2024, the exam difficulty may have been adjusted; Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, adjacent to Hunan Province, with close geographical distance and similar culture, naturally attracting Hunan candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Hunan Province, making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 23042, the significant reduction of 19.5% in the 2026 enrollment plan (which moves the ranking forward), the 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province (which moves the ranking backward), the positive university reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity (attracting more candidates to apply), after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 20545, with a range of 20045–21045.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3761, 8986, 5793, 6402, and 7221 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (larger ranking number = harder to enter). In the recent three years, it moved from 5793 to 6402 to 7221, accumulating a backward shift of about 1428 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7221. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 36 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 53 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 51 in 2025, remaining stable around 50 in recent years. In 2026, the plan drops to 37, a decrease of 14 from 2025, a reduction of about 27.5%, which theoretically eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 74th, with comprehensive strength among the top provincial universities, strongly attracting middle-score-range liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, with events like the men's volleyball championship boosting the university's visibility. On Douyin, it ranks 43rd out of 106 in popularity (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, helping to attract candidates' attention. Food Science and Engineering (A+) is the university's flagship discipline (mainly related to science). Among liberal arts, Chinese Language and Literature, History, and Law are national first-class undergraduate program construction points, with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors like Chinese Language/Literature and Law are socially hot, with clear advantages for civil service exams. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, a very significant rise that greatly intensifies competition. Compared to 2024's 438 points, the admission threshold has increased. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, adjacent to Hunan Province, with convenient transportation and similar culture, making it a popular cross-province choice for Hunan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7221, the significant 27.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (which moves the ranking forward), the 31.2% surge in History Category candidates in Hunan Province (which moves the ranking significantly backward), and the positive university reputation, the impact of the candidate increase far outweighs the enrollment reduction. After adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 6382, with a range of 5882 to 6882.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical category in Hunan Province from 2021 to 2025 were 3761, 8986, 5793, 6402, and 7221 respectively, showing a trend of first rising, then falling, and then continuously rising. The planned enrollment was 32 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 43 in 2025, with an overall trend of expansion followed by a slight reduction. In 2026, the total medical category plan is 39, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.3%, exerting certain downward pressure on rankings (ranking number decreases, making admission easier).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province. The university has strong medical disciplines, with multiple national first-class undergraduate program construction points such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, and enjoys high recognition and influence in the region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to heat up, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing fierce competition. Nanchang University is located in a central provincial capital city, with obvious locational advantages, attracting some Hunan Province candidates. The province's medical enrollment scale is moderate, with a plan of 39 in 2026, covering multiple directions including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Pharmacy, and Nursing, with a wide range of majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation results of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical category in 2026 is approximately 6868, with a corresponding ranking range of 6593 to 7143. Affected by the enrollment reduction in 2026, the ranking will decrease compared to 2025 (easier admission), but the continuous heating of medical popularity offsets the downward magnitude brought by the enrollment reduction to some extent.
